added.title: The Eso of Eso
added.description: Kanfo, the leader of the Eso Warriors of Elu, brings his inquisitive son Toye along on the hunt for Iyanu while she encounters Mama Sewa, the astute matriarch of the Riverlands Settlement who has secret knowledge of Iyanu's past and powers.

added.title: The Source Part I
added.description: As Cursed animals besiege Elu, Iyanu searches for The Source. Meanwhile, Biyi, Toye, Olori and Kanfo launch a counterattack against Chancellor Nuro and his forces, who are trying to prevent Iyanu from lifting the Curse on Yorubaland.

added.title: The Pink Painter Strikes Again
added.description: They're baaaaack! All 16 Campers from Season One return for more spills, thrills and dramaaaaa! And a very special guest arrives on the island to really mess things up. Hope everyone packed an extra pair of pants!

added.title: Jurassic Fart
added.description: After an all-bean breakfast the teams must cross the island in silence to avoid being eaten by raptors. That's right, this episode has dinosaurs... and lots of farting. The first team to reach the other side claims victory.

added.title: Launch Back of Notre Game
added.description: Catapult your team member into distant scoring zones to earn points but if you miss you'll be landing in a penalty zone filled with all kind of evil. The first team to reach 10,000 points wins. The losing team, as always, will be sending someone home.

added.title: Severe Eggs & Pains
added.description: Chris responds to the network's ask for a holiday special by making the campers hunt for eggs. With the teams now merged it's all about being the first one back with an egg and winning immunity. Well, and not getting gutted by a giant bird.

added.title: The Wheel of Vomit
added.description: Chef finally gets to show off his fancy culinary skills in an eating challenge where each dish is a tastebud's nightmare. The last camper still eating wins immunity. The rest are all up for elimination.

added.title: Paddle Field Earth
added.description: Today's challenge involves canoeing, hiking and mountain climbing. It's just like normal summer camp!! Except that you canoe over a waterfall, hike through a geyser field and climb a mountain that's actually the world's biggest beehive. It's nothing like summer camp.

added.title: The Truth, The Pole Truth and Nothing But the Truth
added.description: If spending the day balancing on a pole under the direct sun with no food in your tummy sounds like a fun time you are going to love today's challenge.

added.title: Tortoise Rigamortis
added.description: With just 5 campers remaining things are getting tense. So today is just about having fun taking selfies with wild animals. Everyone had their rabies shot?

added.title: Caved by the Bell
added.description: The final 4 get must wander through a dark and spooky cave hunting for coins. The challenge only gets worse when they discover that something is also hunting them.

added.title: Magma Cum Laude
added.description: This is it! Today one of the 3 remaining campers will become a millionaire. The only thing standing in their way is 2 other campers, a forest, some lava, some violent goats, a mountain, and vomit. Other than that, pretty easy.

added.title: Ralph
added.description: Charlie meets a creature just like him named Ralph. Charlie loves having a new friend, but the Bears think Ralph is bad news.

added.title: Planet Bears
added.description: A nature documentary follows the Bears through their normal routine, which includes a trip to the grocery store.

added.title: Coffee Cave
added.description: After finding out Ice Bear is a master barista, the Bears turn their cave into a popular coffee shop. But it all goes awry when Ice Bear gets too into coffee and goes berserk.

added.title: Charlie's Big Foot
added.description: After Charlie hurts his foot, The Bears have to sneak him into a hospital for medical assistance.

added.title: The Demon
added.description: Chloe and Ice Bear accidentally lose Chloe's prized hoodie to the ferocious dog next store. They go on a mission to get it back.

added.title: Panda's Art
added.description: Panda paints a portrait of Charlie and it's a hit with his art class. But after an art dealer offers to buy the painting, Panda has to get it back from Charlie.

added.title: Poppy Rangers
added.description: Ranger Tabes leads a troop of young girls into a cave expedition, and brings Grizz as their cave expert.

added.title: Lucy's Brother
added.description: To impress Lucy Panda offers to babysit her brother, Clifford. But Clifford turns out to be too high maintenance for Panda to handle.

added.title: The Fair
added.description: The Baby Bears make a deal with a carnival worker to be prizes for a game of ball toss.

added.title: Private Lake
added.description: When the local lake is overcrowded with tourists, the Bears have fun at Charlie's private lake.

added.title: Chapter 11: The Metaphysical Reserve
added.description: Susie steps through a portal into another realm.

added.title: Chapter 12: Night's Pockets
added.description: Pajamas and Jimjams try to find Time.

added.title: Chapter 13: Jar Guard
added.description: Mildred's Friend tells a cautionary tale.

added.title: Chapter 14: Bear With Me
added.description: A surprise visitor arrives on Summer Camp Island.

added.title: Chapter 15: Croissant Moon
added.description: The magical creatures work together to send Mildred on a mission so they can have a special bedtime.
